detection.phantom_object: Bounding box on shadow, reflection, sign, etc.

tracking.id_switch: Same physical object, two different IDs
tracking.id_reuse: Different physical objects given same ID
tracking.lost_during_occlusion: Track ended when object was briefly occluded
tracking.phantom_persistence: Track continued after object actually left frame

stabilisation.homography_failure: ORB couldn't find enough matches; polygon drifted
stabilisation.overcorrection: ORB matched on moving object; polygon shifted incorrectly

logic.direction_flapping: Direction oscillated rapidly during steady walk
logic.clearing_too_early: CLEARING fired before pedestrian was actually safe
logic.clearing_too_late: Pedestrian clearly safe but still in CROSSING
logic.violator_already_passed: Vehicle was behind pedestrian, still flagged
logic.stationary_pedestrian_triggered: Standing pedestrian (e.g. waiting on kerb) triggered violation

ocr.no_plate_detected: Clear plate visible, LP detector missed it
ocr.misread_characters: Plate detected, OCR read wrong characters

environmental.rain_blur: Rain on lens or motion blur
environmental.wet_road_reflection: Reflection on wet road created phantom
